errors.name: inspect-nonexistent
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to inspect
errors.stderr: {"error":"Session `nonexistent123` was not found.","example":"gaal inspect latest -H","exit_code":3,"hint":"List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal inspect` with a valid 8-character ID prefix.","ok":false}

errors.name: inspect-nonexistent-human
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to inspect (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: Session `nonexistent123` was not found.
Example: gaal inspect latest -H
Hint: List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal inspect` with a valid 8-character ID prefix.

errors.name: transcript-nonexistent
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to transcript
errors.stderr: {"error":"Session `nonexistent123; hint: run 'gaal ls' to see available sessions` was not found, so no transcript could be generated.","example":"gaal transcript latest -H","exit_code":3,"hint":"List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal transcript` with a valid session ID.","ok":false}

errors.name: transcript-nonexistent-human
errors.description: Unknown session ID passed to transcript (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: Session `nonexistent123; hint: run 'gaal ls' to see available sessions` was not found, so no transcript could be generated.
Example: gaal transcript latest -H
Hint: List recent sessions with `gaal ls --since 7d -H`, then rerun `gaal transcript` with a valid session ID.

errors.name: find-salt-nonexistent
errors.description: find-salt returns NotFound for nonexistent salt token
errors.stderr: {"error":"No session JSONL file contains salt token `XNOSALT_9f8e7d6c5b4a3210_XNOSALT`.","example":"gaal find-salt GAAL_SALT_abc123","exit_code":3,"hint":"Generate or copy the exact token with `gaal salt`, then rerun `gaal find-salt` with that full value.","ok":false}

errors.name: find-salt-nonexistent-human
errors.description: find-salt returns NotFound for nonexistent salt token (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: No session JSONL file contains salt token `XNOSALT_9f8e7d6c5b4a3210_XNOSALT`.
Example: gaal find-salt GAAL_SALT_abc123
Hint: Generate or copy the exact token with `gaal salt`, then rerun `gaal find-salt` with that full value.

errors.name: tag-nonexistent-session

errors.stderr: {"error":"Session `nonexistent123` was not found, so tags could not be updated.","example":"gaal tag 249aad1e deployment","exit_code":3,"hint":"Find a valid session ID with `gaal ls --since 30d -H`, then rerun `gaal tag`.","ok":false}

errors.name: inspect-ambiguous
errors.description: Single-char ID prefix matches multiple sessions
errors.stderr: {"error":"Multiple sessions match `a`.","example":"gaal inspect 249aad1e -H","exit_code":2,"hint":"Use a longer session ID prefix or inspect the available IDs with `gaal ls --since 30d -H`.","ok":false}

errors.name: transcript-ambiguous
errors.description: Ambiguous prefix for transcript
errors.stderr: {"error":"Multiple sessions match `a`.","example":"gaal transcript latest -H","exit_code":2,"hint":"Use a longer session ID prefix or inspect the available IDs with `gaal ls --since 30d -H`.","ok":false}

errors.name: who-no-verb
errors.description: Missing verb in who command — target without action
errors.stderr: {"error":"The `who` command needs a verb such as `read`, `wrote`, or `ran`.","example":"gaal who ran cargo --since 7d -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Choose one supported verb, then provide an optional target to narrow the match.","ok":false}

errors.name: who-no-verb-human
errors.description: Missing verb in who command (human mode)
errors.stderr:
What went wrong: The `who` command needs a verb such as `read`, `wrote`, or `ran`.
Example: gaal who ran cargo --since 7d -H
Hint: Choose one supported verb, then provide an optional target to narrow the match.

errors.name: who-invalid-verb
errors.description: Invalid verb in who command
errors.stderr: {"error":"The `who` command needs a verb such as `read`, `wrote`, or `ran`.","example":"gaal who ran cargo --since 7d -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Choose one supported verb, then provide an optional target to narrow the match.","ok":false}

errors.name: search-empty-parse-error
errors.description: Empty search query
errors.stderr: {"error":"The search query is empty.","example":"gaal search \"database migration\" -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Provide a non-empty query string, or use `gaal ls --since 30d -H` if you want to browse sessions instead of search fact text.","ok":false}

errors.name: find-salt-no-arg
errors.description: find-salt with no salt token argument
errors.stderr: {"error":"The `find-salt` command needs a salt token.","example":"gaal find-salt GAAL_SALT_abc123","exit_code":11,"hint":"Generate a token with `gaal salt` or copy an existing one from a session, then rerun `gaal find-salt`.","ok":false}

errors.name: tag-no-args
errors.description: tag with no arguments at all
errors.stderr: {"error":"The `tag` command needs a session ID or `ls`.","example":"gaal tag 249aad1e deployment","exit_code":11,"hint":"Use `gaal tag ls` to list known tags, or pass a session ID followed by one or more tags.","ok":false}

errors.name: ls-since-garbage
errors.description: Invalid date format in --since
errors.stderr: {"error":"The command arguments are invalid: invalid time bound `garbage` (expected duration like 1h, date, or RFC3339)","example":"gaal ls --since 7d -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Adjust the arguments shown above, then rerun the command.","ok":false}

errors.name: who-since-garbage
errors.description: Invalid date in --since for who
errors.stderr: {"error":"The command arguments are invalid: invalid time value: garbage (use 7d, 24h, today, YYYY-MM-DD, or RFC3339)","example":"gaal who ran cargo --since 7d -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Adjust the arguments shown above, then rerun the command.","ok":false}

errors.name: inspect-no-selector
errors.description: Inspect with no ID, no --ids, no --tag
errors.stderr: {"error":"The inspect command needs a session selector.","example":"gaal inspect latest -H","exit_code":11,"hint":"Pass a session ID, `latest`, `--ids`, or `--tag` to select at least one session.","ok":false}

errors.name: transcript-no-id
errors.description: Transcript with no ID prints help (exits 0)
errors.stderr:
gaal transcript — Get session transcript markdown (replaces inspect --markdown)

Usage: gaal transcript <session-id> [flags]

Arguments:
  <session-id>    Session ID, ID prefix, or `latest`

Flags:
  --force         Re-render even if cached markdown exists
  --stdout        Print markdown to stdout (no JSON wrapper)
  -H, --human     Print a human-readable summary instead of JSON

Examples:
  gaal transcript latest
  gaal transcript 249aad1e
  gaal transcript latest --stdout
  gaal transcript latest --force
  gaal ls    # if session resolution fails

errors.name: ls-no-results
errors.description: ls with a window that has zero sessions
errors.stderr: {"error":"No sessions matched those filters.","example":"gaal ls --since 30d -H","exit_code":1,"hint":"Widen the time range, remove restrictive filters like `--tag`, or add `--all` to include short noise sessions.","ok":false}

errors.name: search-no-results
errors.description: Search for a term with 1-second time window guarantees no results
errors.stderr: {"error":"No indexed facts matched that search query.","example":"gaal search \"build failure\" --since 30d -H","exit_code":1,"hint":"Try a broader term, a wider `--since` window, or a different `--field` filter.","ok":false}

errors.name: search-empty
errors.description: search with 1-second window returns NoResults
errors.stderr: {"error":"No indexed facts matched that search query.","example":"gaal search \"build failure\" --since 30d -H","exit_code":1,"hint":"Try a broader term, a wider `--since` window, or a different `--field` filter.","ok":false}

errors.name: who-no-results
errors.description: who query that matches no sessions
errors.stderr: {"error":"No sessions matched that attribution query.","example":"gaal who ran cargo --since 30d -H","exit_code":1,"hint":"Broaden the time range, remove extra filters, or try another verb such as `read`, `wrote`, or `touched`.","ok":false}

errors.name: recall-no-args
errors.description: recall with no args prints help and exits 0
errors.stderr:
gaal recall — Ranked session retrieval for continuity and context

Usage: gaal recall <query> [flags]

Flags:
  --days-back <n>    Recency window in days (default: 14)
  --limit <n>        Max number of sessions to return (default: 3)
  --format <fmt>     Output format: summary, brief, handoff, full, eywa (default: brief)
  --substance <n>    Minimum substance score (default: 1)
  -H                 Human-readable output

Examples:
  gaal recall "gaussian moat" -H
  gaal recall "auth migration" --days-back 30 --limit 5
  gaal recall "deploy" --format handoff
